description:
Native REST API client for Windows, macOS and Linux


- Added Account window including Profile, Sessions, Security pages
- Added two-factor authentication (2FA) [issues-16]
- Added OpenAPI 3.1 support for import [issues-25]
- Added the ability to import and export Form URL Encoded and Form Data requests
- Added confirmation window when deleting workspace
- Added function for formatting date and time [issues-28]
- Added tooltips for functions with execution results [issues-26]
- Added additional keyboard shortcut for commenting a line [issues-8]
- Added the ability to change the window size at the top border [issues-32]
- Improved Form URL Encoded body filling [issues-29]
- Fixed hotkeys on macOS [issues-30]
- Fixed bug with saving date cookies [issues-18]
